Smeargle

#0234 Stantler #0236 Tyrogue
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Smeargle is a Normal type Pokémon introduced in Generation 2.

Smeargle

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0235
Type Normal
Species Painter Pokémon
Height 1.2 m (3′11″)
Weight 58.0 kg (127.9 lbs)
Abilities 1. Own Tempo
2. Technician
Moody (hidden ability)
Local № 0157 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0159 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0124 (X/Y — Central Kalos)
0058 (Sun/Moon — Alola dex)
0070 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0040 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 1 Speed
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 88
Growth Rate Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 55
220 314
Attack 20
40 152
Defense 35
67 185
Sp. Atk 20
40 152
Sp. Def 45
85 207
Speed 75
139 273
Total 250 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Type defenses

The effectiveness of each type on Smeargle.

NorFirWatEleGraIceFigPoiGro
2
FlyPsyBugRocGhoDraDarSteFai
0

Evolution chart

  • Smeargle does not evolve.

Smeargle changes

  • In Generation 3, Smeargle does not have the Technician ability.
  • In Generations 2-4, Smeargle has a base experience yield of 106.
  • In Generations 2-7, Smeargle has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Gold A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
Silver Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.
Crystal The color of the mysterious fluid secreted from its tail is predetermined for each SMEARGLE.
Ruby
Sapphire		 SMEARGLE marks the boundaries of its territory using a body fluid that leaks out from the tip of its tail. Over 5,000 different marks left by this POKéMON have been found.
FireRed Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.
LeafGreen A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
Emerald A SMEARGLE marks its territory using a fluid that leaks out from the tip of its tail. About 5,000 different marks left by this POKéMON have been found.
Diamond
Pearl
Platinum		 It marks its territory by using its tail like a paintbrush. There are more than 5,000 different marks.
HeartGold A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
SoulSilver Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 It marks its territory by using its tail like a paintbrush. There are more than 5,000 different marks.
X It marks its territory by using its tail like a paintbrush. There are more than 5,000 different marks.
Y Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 Smeargle marks the boundaries of its territory using a body fluid that leaks out from the tip of its tail. Over 5,000 different marks left by this Pokémon have been found.
Sun The unique creations produced by each Smeargle are painted using the fluid that oozes from its tail. This is how it marks its territory.
Moon It draws symbols all over the place to mark its territory. In towns with many Smeargle, the walls are covered in graffiti.
Ultra Sun The fluid of Smeargle’s tail secretions changes in the intensity of its hue as the Pokémon’s emotions change.
Ultra Moon It draws symbols with the fluid that oozes from the tip of its tail. Depending on the symbol, Smeargle fanatics will pay big money for them.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It marks its territory by using its tail like a paintbrush. There are more than 5,000 different marks.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Smeargle does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Smeargle cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by level up

Smeargle learns the following moves in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet at the levels specified.

Lv.
Move
Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.
1SketchNormal — —

Egg moves

Smeargle does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.

Moves learnt by TM

Smeargle cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.

Answers to Smeargle questions

  • What is a good moveset for Smeargle?
  • If Smeargle uses sketch on a pokemon that just used metronome which will it sketch?
  • Can smeargle use HMs outside of battles?
  • Where can I find a Smeargle?
  • Can a Smeargle sketch a two-turn attack on the first turn?
  • Can Smeargle learn two of the same move?
  • Will transformed Pokemon keep its catch rate?
  • What if someone had enough Candies to teach Smeargle a new move?
  • If smergle uses sketch on a Smeargle with sketch will it be an endless battle ?

Other languages

English Smeargle
Japanese ドーブル (Doble)
German Farbeagle
French Queulorior
Italian Smeargle
Spanish Smeargle
Korean 루브도 (rubeudo)
Chinese (Simplified) 图图犬
Chinese (Traditional) 圖圖犬

 

English Painter Pokémon
Japanese えかきポケモン
German Maler-Pokémon
French Pokémon Peintre
Italian Pokémon Pittore
Spanish Pokémon Pintor
Korean 그림장이포켓몬
Chinese (Simplified) 画画宝可梦
Chinese (Traditional) 畫畫寶可夢

Name origin

smear
smudge (e.g. ink, paint)
beagle
a breed of dog
